creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Moving from lang/gcc13 to lang/gcc14 since new features should target
the latest release (so in fact maybe lang/gcc15-devel might be best in 
preparation for GCC 15 which will arrive in the next months).

In any case this is a feature request that clearly is not making it to
the top of the queue given other priorities - unless and until someone
wants to propose a working patch, so allow me to close this report.

To be clear, when/if there is a working patch I assume this can go in.
